request_payload.exposure_text: As a mother and a taxpayer, I've always believed in supporting our military to keep our families safe. But did you know that increasing defense spending doesn't just mean more weapons? It's about modernizing our forces to deter threats without putting our troops in harm's way. Countries like Japan and South Korea are increasing their defense budgets to share the burden. Shouldn't we ensure our allies are stepping up while we invest in cutting-edge defense tech to protect our interests? #NationalSecurity #SmartDefense
